name: archmarshal
description: Codex-native, safety-first governance for projects, Skills, memory, and reproducible closeouts.

interface.shortDescription: Safely govern Codex projects and reusable Skills.
interface.longDescription: ArchMarshal is a Codex-native management plugin that preserves confirmed user layouts while organizing project and Skill lifecycles without rewriting existing content. It provides review-first adoption, bounded health diagnostics, date/tag project organization, evidence-based closeout, and deliberate reusable-Skill and habit learning.
defaultPrompt: Safely organize this project and its Skills with ArchMarshal.
Preserve my existing project layout and show every mapped path before adoption.
Show every Skill directory ArchMarshal would manage and exclude the packages I name.
Audit this project's ArchMarshal health without changing files.
Close this project with reproducible evidence and reusable Skill candidates.
Safely update ArchMarshal without touching the current project.
